aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Titanium Air due to limited conversational content and missing authority signals. Their current site is more focused on basic SEO rather than AEO best practices.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and installation processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and accurate contact information, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage with local customers.
Q&A section is inactive and not utilized to address customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any inaccuracies or duplicates.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
No Service schema for specific HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and local service comparisons.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema to address common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise to position as THE local HVAC authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO optimization, Titanium Air misses out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to ensure AI models recognize and recommend Titanium Air as the top HVAC provider in St. Petersburg.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already optimizing for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business Today!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI search engines.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your HVAC expertise undeniable to AI models and boost your lead generation.
